description: CCP-16 synchronized hopping and desync vectors with now_ts and select_channel_timing test per project-LICHEN-rs2q. Uses input/output for ccp_vector schema.

vectors.name: synchronized_hop_channel_consistency
vectors.description: synchronized_hop_channel(eui64=0x0011223344556677, t=4660, epoch=1) yields expected per CCP-12 pseudocode and hash_32 from ccp15. Receiver prediction matches sender.

vectors.name: epoch_wrap_hop_change
vectors.description: Epoch increment changes hop sequence. Tests desync recovery interaction per CCP-16.

vectors.name: select_channel_timing_test
vectors.description: select_channel_timing with now_ts near u32 wrap tests TDMA/SFN per project-LICHEN-rs2q.
